ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Keyword that will trigger the action (single words, case sensitive).
ast.target: 将触发操作的关键词（单个单词，区分大小写）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Text that will be prepended to the filename. Can use placeholders such as {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}} (Moment.js formatting).
ast.target: 将添加到文件名前的文本。可以使用占位符，例如 {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}（Moment.js 格式）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Location for the saved note. Can use placeholders such as {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}} (Moment.js formatting).
ast.target: 保存笔记的位置。可以使用占位符，例如 {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}（Moment.js 格式）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Create a command to save directly into the folder.
ast.target: 创建一个命令以直接保存到文件夹。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Important: Command changes will show up in the command palette after an app relaunch or reenabling the plugin.
ast.target: 重要提示：命令更改将在应用重新启动或重新启用插件后显示在命令面板中。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Force file creation adding a number at the end if the folder/filename is already in use. Default behavior will open the existing file.
ast.target: 如果文件夹/文件名已被使用，强制创建文件并在末尾添加数字。默认行为将打开现有文件。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show prefix list in note creation modal.
ast.target: 在笔记创建模态框中显示前缀列表。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Escape symbol to avoid checking the prefix and moving the note.
ast.target: 用于避免检查前缀和移动笔记的转义符号。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Optional separator between the prefix and the filename (space character by default).
ast.target: 前缀和文件名之间的可选分隔符（默认为空格字符）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Capitalize note name and new folders.
ast.target: 将笔记名称和新文件夹首字母大写。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add new prefixes or create command shortcuts for saving directly into folders.
ast.target: 添加新前缀或创建用于直接保存到文件夹的命令快捷方式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rapid notes: The custom command needs an Obsidian relaunch to work properly.
ast.target: 快速笔记：自定义命令需要重新启动 Obsidian 才能正常工作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rapid notes: The custom command will be removed after Obsidian relaunches.
ast.target: 快速笔记：自定义命令将在 Obsidian 重新启动后被移除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This folder already has a prefix associated with it.
ast.target: 此文件夹已有关联的前缀。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在当前标签页新建笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在后台标签页新建笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: New inline note (open in new tab)
ast.target: 新建内联笔记（在新标签页中打开）

ast.name: name
ast.source: New inline note (open in background tab)
ast.target: 新建内联笔记（在后台标签页中打开）

ast.name: name
ast.source: New inline note (open in new pane)
ast.target: 新建内联笔记（在新窗格中打开）

ast.name: name
ast.source: New inline note (open in new window)
ast.target: 新建内联笔记（在新窗口中打开）

ast.name: text
ast.source: [New!] Now you can also create notes and link to them directly from the editor while typing using the plugin inline commands. You can trigger the command while the cursor is inside the link in double brackets, or just by selecting any text in the editor.
ast.target: [新功能！] 现在您还可以在编辑器中输入时，通过插件内联命令直接创建笔记并链接到它们。您可以在双括号内的链接中触发命令，或者只需在编辑器中选择任何文本。
